reasoning: The interviewer's question about user types elicited information about two hidden requirements: IR4 (administrator role managing user records and replying to messages) was directly stated in the answer, and IR3 (users editing their own personal information) was revealed when the user mentioned regular users can 'manage their own profiles.' IR1 was partially touched upon with mention of registration and login, but the password system aspect was not specified. IR2 and IR5 were not addressed.
